name: Concentration Candy Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Place sheets of foil on countertop for cooling cookies. Reserve 42 pieces of each color candy in separate bowls. Set aside.
2. In a large bowl, combine brown sugar, shortening, milk and vanilla. Beat at medium speed of electric mixer until well blended. Add egg and beat into creamed mixture.
3. In another bowl, combine flour, salt and baking soda. Mix into creamed mixture just until blended. Stir in unreserved candy pieces and pecans.
4. Using a rounded measuring tablespoon, drop dough 3 inches (7.5 cm) apart onto an ungreased baking sheet.
5. Bake one baking sheet at a time for 5 minutes at 375°F (190°C). Remove from oven and press same color candies onto the top of two cookies. Repeat with pairs of cookies using different colored candies. Return cookies to oven and bake an additional 4 minutes. Do not overbake. Cool 2 minutes on baking sheet. Remove cookies to foil to cool completely. Makes about 3 dozen cookies.
